mapper.select: SELECT hotplace_id, user_id, title, visit_date, place_type, description, latitude, longitude, image_path, created_at FROM hotplace ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT hotplace_id, user_id, title, visit_date, place_type, description, latitude, longitude, image_path, created_at FROM hotplace WHERE hotplace_id = #{hotplaceId}
SELECT hotplace_id, user_id, title, visit_date, place_type, description, latitude, longitude, image_path, created_at FROM hotplace WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotplace (user_id, title, visit_date, place_type, description, latitude, longitude, image_path) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{visitDate}, #{placeType}, #{description}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{imagePath})
mapper.update: UPDATE hotplace SET title = #{title}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, place_type = #{placeType}, description = #{description}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, image_path = #{imagePath} WHERE hotplace_id = #{hotplaceId}
